offer: For restaurant operators processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes missed opportunities for customer engagement. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating actionable insights from customer data for loyalty programs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant operators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to restaurant operators with demo video
Share tools in community forums for restaurant operators
try_it: Let users try customer data visualization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Default reminder schedule options for users
CSV import feature for existing customer data
Streamline steps in user onboarding process
